CISSP · Timed Simulation

Practice Exam 1

A full-length, exam-conditions simulation drawn from all eight CISSP domains. Once you begin, the clock does not stop.

  • 125Questions — mixed across all domains, shuffled each attempt along with their answer options.
  • 120Minutes — the exam ends automatically when the timer expires, and everything answered up to that point is scored.
  • →No going back. Every question must be answered before you can advance, and once you do, it's locked.
  • 70%Passing threshold. Score 70% or higher and you're tracking well for the real thing.
  • ✓Full review after submission — every question with your answer, the correct answer, and a full explanation.
